required_preferences.fact: Avoids all work cafeteria meals entirely — exclusively brings lunch from home due to IBS dietary restrictions

supersedes.fact: Never eats fried foods at the work cafeteria — opts for salads or grain bowls instead

required_preferences.fact: Visits her mother multiple times a week for post-operative care and errands, prioritizing her recovery needs over her previous weekend-only visits

supersedes.fact: Only visits her mother on alternate weekends — never drops by unannounced during weekdays

required_preferences.fact: Schedules video calls with her boyfriend later in the evening on early shifts and right after work on late shifts, adapting their routine to alternating schedules
Switches from reading e-books to listening to audiobooks or podcasts during leisure time at home to minimize additional screen exposure in the evenings
Prefers chat-based internal communication with colleagues; avoids phone unless necessary
Checks her personal email only once a day after work; never during working hours

persona: An entry-level support agent at a regional telecommunications provider
